title: PaperSpeed Zero
body:
This is a Paper port for [NeoSpeed Zero](https://modrinth.com/mod/neospeedzero) Mod, with experimental Folia support.

**For 26.1+ server admins**: NeoSpeed Zero has already implemented Paper support (without Folia).

## Commands

Identical to NeoSpeed Zero.

## Goals & Data Pack

Same as NeoSpeed Zero, goals are loaded from data packs.

Please note that you should **restart the server** after loading a data pack with Speedrun goals, since goals are only loaded when the plugin is enabled.

### Built-in Goals

NeoSpeed Zero built-in goals are not embedded into this plugin.

By default, these goals are not loaded. However, you can edit `plugins/PaperSpeedZero/Remote-NS0-Pack.properties` to enable remote downloading.

Supported formats:

- `ns0-pack-source=Minecraft 1.21.11`: Download NeoSpeedZero mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 from Modrinth, and load it as a data pack.
- `ns0-pack-source=<url>`: Download the data pack from `<url>`.

Pack format metadata are automatically fixed.
